title: Natural Progression
description: Realistic Early-Game, Preventing Tree Punching and More!
body: Natural Progression is a mod designed around overhauling the early-game to be more realistic, starting with a unique early-game tool creation mechanic all the way to primitive tools and early weaponry. There's plenty in Natural Progression, such as Knaping, Sharpening, Sawing and Stripping Recipes, and integration with many mods! Check out the [Wiki](https://mods.oitsjustjose.com/NaturalProgressions/)!
